title: Optional Equivalence
description: Stabilize your EMC items to prevent them from being transmuted accidently
body:
# Optional Equivalence ### **1.12.2 Only** ### Dependencies: - [MixinBooter](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mixin-booter) - [ProjectE](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/projecte) ----- ### Description This mod allows you to stabilize the EMC value of items, preventing them from being transmuted.
To stabilize the EMC of an item, craft it together with the stabilization tape.
Craft it with the destabilization scissors to undo the stabilization.
NBT Tags can be added in the config, to stabilize any item with that tag permanently.
Contains `omniwand:data` and `akashictome:data` by default.
The stabilization items can also be completely disabled in the config, if you only want the nbt feature.
----- If you notice any issues or have suggestions for new features, feel free to open an issue.
